title: The Courage of Marge O'Doone
writer: Robert N. Bradbury, James Oliver Curwood
actors: Pauline Starke, Niles Welch, George Stanley
plot: Michael O'Doone, his wife Margaret and daughter Marge are settlers living in the Northwest. One winter day, while on a journey, Michael meets with an accident and fails to return home. Believing that he is dead, Margaret goes into...
